title: ilex trachyphylla
intro: Ilex trachyphylla, also known as Japanese holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is a deciduous shrub with medicinal properties, traditionally used in Asian medicine to treat various health issues. The leaves and berries of Ilex trachyphylla have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Ilex trachyphylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
